turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, main appointment cancel karwana chahta hoon. I'm not feeling well enough to come today actually, ironic as that sounds.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Oh, please take care! Could you share your name and appointment details?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Rohit Chandra. I had a 3 PM slot with Dr. Anjali Verma today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. I see that appointment. I'll cancel it now. Once you're feeling better, would you like me to note a preferred time for rebooking?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Maybe next week sometime, in the morning. But I'll call back, I don't know my schedule yet.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Totally fine. The appointment is cancelled now. Please rest and do call us when you're ready to book again. Get well soon, Mr. Chandra!
